channel.title: adamnoteve
channel.description: Breakup & villain-era merch — petty tees, mugs, stickers & more.

item.g:title: Funny Breakup Mug — 'I Dodged a Bullet' Coffee Cup | Divorce Gift for Her 🍎
item.g:description:
A funny breakup gift that says what you're thinking: you dodged a bullet. This petty coffee mug is perfect for a divorce gift for her, a newly-single bestie, or your own villain era morning brew. Microwave-safe, trauma-tested. Sip your closure — add it to your cart.
More: funny breakup mug, breakup gift for her, divorce gift, funny coffee mug, petty gift, villain era gift, single girl gift, dodged a bullet.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Drinkware > Mugs
item.g:product_type: Funny Breakup Mug > Breakup Gift For Her > Divorce Gift

item.g:title: 'Thanks for the Trauma' Hoodie — Funny Breakup Sweatshirt | Villain Era Gift 🍎
item.g:description:
A cozy funny breakup hoodie for your villain era — soft on the outside, salty on the inside. This petty sweatshirt makes a hilarious breakup gift, ex-boyfriend revenge dressing, or self-love comfort wear. Great for divorce healing and hot single winters. Wrap up in it.

item.g:product_type: Funny Breakup Hoodie > Villain Era Outfit > Petty Sweatshirt

item.g:title: 'Deleted Him, Downloaded Peace' Tee — Funny Self Love Breakup Shirt | Healing Gift 🍎
item.g:description:
'Deleted him, downloaded peace.' The glow-up in one line — a funny self-love and healing-era tee for the bestie who chose herself. Petty breakup gift on a soft value Gildan, built for group orders and matching squads. Update your life — add to cart.

item.g:product_type: Funny Breakup Shirt > Self Love Tee > Healing Era

item.g:title: 'We Were a Mistake' Candle — Petty Breakup Gift | Funny Ex Candle 🍎
item.g:description:
Notes of 'I told you so,' vintage regret, and a hint of 'you up?' This funny breakup candle is the pettiest self-care gift for a divorce party, girls' night, or your own healing era. Pick your scent, hand-poured. A hilarious anti-valentine gift for her. Light it and let go.

item.g:description:
Carry your groceries, your trauma, and your entire personality in one bag. This funny tote bag is a petty breakup gift, villain era accessory, and everyday aesthetic tote for the girl who dated red flags on purpose. Great for book club, farmers market, and self-love shopping sprees. Tote your truth.

item.g:description:
Slap it on your laptop, journal, or your therapist's door. This petty breakup sticker is three sizes of truth for the freshly single, the villain era enthusiast, and the closure-is-a-myth believer. A cute waterproof laptop and water bottle sticker + tiny funny gift. Stick it on and move on.

item.g:title: 'Toxic Ex Repellent' Candle — Funny Breakup Candle | Petty Divorce Gift 🍎
item.g:description:
